subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the Almighty, the Most Powerful, the All-Wise, that he may rejoice in the remembrance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی آمن بالله المقتدر العزیز الحکیم لیستبشر بذکر الله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
